changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_inventory';

changeSet.comment:
Fix inventory menu order to appear before Admin menu. FRS AC-1: Inventory appears as top-level menu item before Admin.
Current menu order: - Reports: 100 - Admin: 110 - Billing: 120 - Inventory: 127 (WRONG - should be before Admin)
New order: - Reports: 100 - Inventory: 105 (NEW - before Admin) - Admin: 110 - Billing: 120
